news.t: Risk-taker's market? Why it may be practical to take chips off the table
Capital Group Unveils Five New Active ETFs, Including Its First Multi-Asset ETF

overview.description: The Capital Group Core Bond ETF (CGCB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US and non-US bonds rated as investment grade. Holdings may also include other debt securities and derivatives. CGCB was launched on Sep 26, 2023 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.title: Risk-taker's market? Why it may be practical to take chips off the table
data.text: Two market experts tackle the appropriate appetite for risk during market ugliness.

data.title: When the going gets tough, the tough get… "active"?
data.text: When the going gets tough, the tough get… "active"?.

data.title: Capital Group Unveils Five New Active ETFs, Including Its First Multi-Asset ETF
data.text: LOS ANGELES, Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Capital Group launched five active exchange-traded funds (ETFs) today on the New York Stock Exchange. This compelling lineup includes its first-ever multi-a...
